title: Request for disconnection liabilities selecting logic

ancestors.title: Request for disconnection of the power supply

storage.value:
User requirement

As a system user, I want to create an “charge fee” invoice for each selected liabilities in the request for disconnection

So that I will always possible to generate “Charge fee” invoice

Short description about “Charge fee” invoice generating process

When a customer does not cover their liability before the due date, the system first issues a notification through the “Reminder for Disconnection” object to inform the customer about the outstanding liability. If, even after this reminder, the liability remains unpaid, the system user can create a “Request for Disconnection” to inform the grid operator to disconnect the customer’s points of delivery. (The Request for Disconnection takes its list of customers from the Reminder for Disconnection.)

Change description

Current flow

After sending a Request for Disconnection, if the liability is still not covered by the due date, the system user has the option to charge the customer an additional late fee. Once the Request for Disconnection is executed, a “Charge Fee” button becomes available. By clicking this button, the system generates an individual Charge Fee invoice for the selected customer. This invoice is generated based on the customer’s liabilities, but currently it is only created for liabilities that already have an outgoing document.

Expected flow

By this change for any type liabilities which are selected in the request for disconnection should be generated “Charge fee” invoice.

This liabilities:

  1. Liability - generated by invoice (Product contract) (Already work)

  2. Manual liability - generated manually (with billing group)

  3. LPF - for LPF which is generated by invoice/For LPF liability which is generated by manual liability

  4. Rescheduling

This change should be implemented in Request for disconnection/Disconnection of the power supply - Charge fee logic. Reconnection of the power supply - Express reconnection

Rescheduling liability.

If a rescheduled liability is selected in the “Request for Disconnection,” then after clicking the “Charge Fee” button, the generated invoice should include this data

  1. Customer - should be taken from liability

  2. Billing group -take billing group from rescheduling object(if rescheduling includes only one billing group), also rescheduling can include several number of billing group, In this case, the system should take the billing group from the contract with the highest ID. If multiple billing groups exist within the same contract, the billing group with the highest ID should be selected.

  3. Contract -Contract in which the billing group is used

  4. Receipt of an invoice -If the alternative customer in the billing group is empty, the sub-object should also remain empty. If an alternative customer is selected, this customer should be displayed.

  5. Communication data- should be taken from “Rescheduling” object

  6. Templates - should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature

  7. Issuer - should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature

  8. Number of income account - should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature

  9. Basis for issuing - should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature

  10. Cost center - should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature

  11. Document type - should be invoice

  12. Status - should be real, immediately create re

  13. Tax even date - should be current day

  14. Payment date - Should be tax event date

  15. Invoice type - reconnection

  16. Invoice prefix - prefix for service/goods invoice

  17. Meter reading from / meter reading to -should be empty

  18. Applicable interest rate - should be empty

  19. Direct debit - should be added from billing group or from contract or from customer (Billing group and customer from latest liability, contract from latest liability’s connected invoice)

  20. Vat rate - should be default VAT rate

  21. Amount excluding vat- should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature’s tax for reconnection field

  22. Value of vat - should be equal (amount excluding vat*vat rate)

  23. Price component or price component group or item - should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature

  24. Value - should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature

  25. Unit of measure for value - should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature

Manual liability

If a manual liability is selected in the “Request for Disconnection,” then after clicking the “Charge Fee” button, the generated invoice should include this data:

  1. Customer - should be taken from liability

  2. Billing group -take billing group which is selected in the liability - billing group sub object

  3. Contract -Contract in which the billing group is used

  4. Receipt of an invoice - If the alternative customer in the billing group is empty, the sub-object should also remain empty. If an alternative customer is selected, this customer should be displayed.

  5. Communication data- should be taken from contract (in which billing group is used)

  6. Templates - should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature

  7. Issuer - should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature

  8. Number of income account - should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature

  9. Basis for issuing - should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature

  10. Cost center - should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature

  11. Document type - should be invoice

  12. Status - should be real, immediately create re

  13. Tax even date - should be current day

  14. Payment date - Should be tax event date

  15. Invoice type - reconnection

  16. Invoice prefix - prefix for service/goods invoice

  17. Meter reading from / meter reading to -should be empty

  18. Applicable interest rate - should be empty

  19. Direct debit - should be added from billing group or from contract or from customer (Billing group and customer from latest liability, contract from latest liability’s connected invoice)

  20. Vat rate - should be default VAT rate

  21. Amount excluding vat- should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature’s tax for reconnection field

  22. Value of vat - should be equal (amount excluding vat*vat rate)

  23. Price component or price component group or item - should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature

  24. Value - should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature

  25. Unit of measure for value - should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature

LPF (for liability without outgoing document/with outgoing document)

If a LPF liability is selected in the “Request for Disconnection,” then after clicking the “Charge Fee” button, the generated invoice should include this data:

  1. Customer - should be taken from liability

  2. Billing group -take billing group which is selected in the liability - billing group sub object

  3. Contract -Contract in which the billing group is used

  4. Receipt of an invoice - If the alternative customer in the billing group is empty, the sub-object should also remain empty. If an alternative customer is selected, this customer should be displayed.

  5. Communication data- should be taken from contract

  6. Templates - should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature

  7. Issuer - should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature

  8. Number of income account - should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature

  9. Basis for issuing - should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature

  10. Cost center - should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature

  11. Document type - should be invoice

  12. Status - should be real, immediately create re

  13. Tax even date - should be current day

  14. Payment date - Should be tax event date

  15. Invoice type - reconnection

  16. Invoice prefix - prefix for service/goods invoice

  17. Meter reading from / meter reading to -should be empty

  18. Applicable interest rate - should be empty

  19. Direct debit - should be added from billing group or from contract or from customer (Billing group and customer from latest liability, contract from latest liability’s connected invoice)

  20. Vat rate - should be default VAT rate

  21. Amount excluding vat- should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature’s tax for reconnection field

  22. Value of vat - should be equal (amount excluding vat*vat rate)

  23. Price component or price component group or item - should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature

  24. Value - should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature

  25. Unit of measure for value - should be taken from “Taxes for grid operator” nomenclature

Additionally,

the Tax Charge Fee Invoice generates a liability, so it should also be possible to use this invoice for generating a Charge Fee Invoice.

2.Tax of disconnection of power supply - also should generate these invoices.
